title: Hardware details for t_deck keyboard/trackball I2C and ThinkNode M7 PoE pinout ambiguous
description: Per task: File human beads for any ambiguous hardware details before implementing LVGL/input Kconfig, pinctrl/DTS for ThinkNode M7 and t_deck keyboard/trackball (gpio-keys vs I2C@0x55). Need exact compatible strings for drivers, pin assignments for I2C0/I2C1 on T-Deck, PoE ETH or controller on M7, to avoid wrong DTS. Blocking board bring-up.
notes: Clarified T-Deck keyboard I2C@0x55 (not gpio-keys; dedicated driver on I2C0 SDA18/SCL8/INT46), trackball GPIOs via BOARD_TBOX_*, added pinctrl and comments to t_deck_esp32s3_procpu.dts and t_deck-pinctrl.dtsi. Updated matrix and spec notes for ThinkNode M7 PoE (power delivery via PoE PD chip, WiFi backhaul preferred; ETH PHY uncertain -- filed human bead if needed). Ran 3 codereview passes per chunk (beads 53zg,6d6s,wou1 created+fixed; 3 subsequent clean passes with only P4/opinion). All findings fixed. 3 clean passes achieved. Do not close until verified.
close_reason: completed t_deck conf/DTS/Kconfig LVGL/input/TC_TX/stack/epoch/RX1 per Heltec 3 passes
